item_3.book: Babel: Or the Necessity of Violence
item_3.author: R.F. Kuang
item_3.description: 'the last capitalist we hang will be the one who sold us the rope.' a brilliant and harrowing exploration of colonialism, capitalism, and resistance.

item_4.author: Patrick Ness
item_4.description: fantastic, bold, and thought-provoking series that explores themes of identity, morality, and the consequences of power.
